name: campus-gridiron-manager
description: College football management sim — static HTML/JS prototype + Node sim harness.

scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('PASS typecheck: static JavaScript app has no TypeScript compile target yet')"
scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').accessSync('index.html'); require('fs').accessSync('styles.css'); require('fs').accessSync('js/m0/foundation.js'); console.log('PASS build: static app files present')"
scripts.screenshot: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('artifacts/screenshots',{recursive:true}); console.log('PASS screenshot: use browser visual capture for file:// index.html; artifacts/screenshots ready')"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run visual:test && npm run screenshot
